title: WOG Adventures+
description: A DnD-inspired vanilla+ modpack focused on making memories without compromise.
body:
![Title banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8213be497e7dfe93df604741febe27901ceafc99.jpeg)

The Wild Oak Guild Adventures+ modpack is a performant vanilla+ modpack designed to embrace the feel of a Dungeons and Dragons world within Minecraft. Embark on epic quests alone or with friends, level up your character, specialize in skills, explore dark dungeons, find shiny loot, create incredible contraptions, airships, boats, and cars thanks to the full Create+ suite and Aeronautics.

### 👥 Full Multiplayer Support
This modpack fully supports playing alone or with friends! We have a running instance on a hosted server running quite well with a handfull of players. Please reach out if you'd like assistance with multiplayer.

### 🌍 Explore a vast, breathtaking world thanks to visual mods such as:
- Distant Horizons
- Iris shaders
- Tectonic
- Nullscape
- BetterEnd
- BetterNether
- Better Animations Collection
- Particular

### 🏰 Adventure alone or with your friends thanks to some RPG mods such as:
- ZsoltMolnarrr's fantastic RPG mod suite (Archers, Paladins & Priests, Rogues & Warriors, Wizards + more)
- End remastered (beating the game requires much more than before, encouraging varried experiences)
- Handcrafted (furniture!)
- Tiered
- Traveler's Backpack
- Goblin Traders
- Lootr

### 🖼️ Create wonderful memories thanks to incredible gameplay mods such as:
- Exposure (film photography with an emphasis on process, we adore this one)
- Emotecraft
- Simple Voice Chat

### ✨ Enjoy a more pleasant Minecraft experience thanks to UX mods such as:
- Roughly Enough Items
- AmbientSounds
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Presence Footsteps
- Mouse Tweaks
- Better Third Person
- Comforts
- Gravestones
- EnhancedVisuals
- Visual Workbench

![a friendly sunset wave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75608afc3f0dc56558093f69ddb84d57a69232dd_0.webp)

Sources:
- ComplementaryReimagined-main.zip: https://github.com/ComplementaryDevelopment/ComplementaryReimagined/archive/refs/heads/main.zip
- Bliss-Shader-main.zip: https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader/archive/refs/heads/main.zip
- MandalasGUI-Dakmode_1.20.5.zip: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mandalas-gui-dark-mode/files/5297551
